markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's content engine for ZipSec's inbound strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**ZipSec's Challenge:** A founder-led sales motion for a $20–30k ASP product is unscalable. The goal is to build a high-quality inbound engine to drive qualified leads and reduce the 3-call sales cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** An AI-powered content "factory" that creates systems for scalable content (e.g., glossaries, docs), not just one-off articles. This targets Google and LLM search to own key topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [**The ROI Hurdle:** ZipSec requires concrete ROI data—e.g., "$100k spent → $3M attributed revenue"—to justify the investment to leadership. The initial cost is $30k for an 8-week strategy sprint, then $15k/month.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=2092.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** Tyler will provide an onboarding guide and schedule a follow-up to discuss a "friends of GrowthX" discount, timeline, and tactical plan.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=2830.0)

## Topics

### ZipSec's Growth Challenge

  - [**Product:** An AI-driven platform productizing the MSP model for SMBs. It automates security compliance, manages licenses (CrowdStrike, SentinelOne), and provides continuous compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**ICPs:**](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
      - [**"Partner of none":** Companies without IT/security staff.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
      - [**"Department of one":** Small security teams (1–3 people).](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
      - [**Security Advisory Firms:** vCISOs and consultants who use ZipSec to provide continuous compliance between engagements, protecting their brand.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [**Business Context:**](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [**Stage:** Series A (raised spring 2025).](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [**Revenue:** Mid-single-digit millions, targeting 5x–8x growth in 12 months.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [**ASP:** $20–30k, making it a sales-assisted product requiring a high-quality inbound pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [**Primary Goal:** Replace the unscalable founder-led sales motion with a high-quality inbound engine.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
      - [**Channel Focus:** Inbound (web, ChatGPT) and a partner program with vCISOs.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [**Messaging Need:** Condense the complex value prop into a clear, compelling pitch for each ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Engine

  - [**Core Concept:** Build a "content factory" (systems) for scalable, high-frequency content, not just one-off pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (8-week Strategy Sprint):**](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
          - [**Cost:** $30k (Series A rate).](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
          - [**Deliverables:** In-depth artifacts (ICP personas, SEO/GEO analysis) to inform AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
          - [**Output:** \~10 published articles to demonstrate quality.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Ongoing Partnership):**](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
          - [**Cost:** $15k/month (Series A rate).](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
          - [**Output:** Daily publishing to maintain recency, which is critical for AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [**Methodology:**](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
      - [**Hybrid AI/Human Workflow:** An "assembly line" of AI agents (research, writing, tone) with human oversight (outlines, final review).](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
      - [**Domain Experts:** Used for highly technical content (e.g., Webflow's dev docs).](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Content Types:** Best for scalable, high-frequency needs like glossaries, guides, and programmatic content. Not ideal for low-volume, hand-crafted assets like case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)

### ROI & Success Metrics

  - [**ZipSec's Requirement:** Concrete ROI data is needed to justify the investment to leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=2433.0)
      - [**Example:** "$100k spent → $3M attributed revenue."](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=2778.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The investment must be a "no-brainer," not a speculative expense.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=2778.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Response:**](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=2092.0)
      - [**Timeline:** 2–3 months for initial signals (signups, leads); \~6 months for full impact.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=2130.0)
      - [**Case Study (Discern):** A company with a similar $20k ASP saw a 3x increase in organic traffic and 25–28% monthly revenue growth coinciding with the GrowthX launch.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=2668.0)
      - [**Case Study (Augment Code):** Drives 150–200 signups/week and ranks for high-intent LLM prompts (e.g., "best AI coding tool").](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=2830.0)
      - [Provide an onboarding guide summarizing the Phase 1 process.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=2830.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up to discuss a "friends of GrowthX" discount, timeline, and tactical plan.](https://fathom.video/share/Dy2Pgg3wDziQG7ZkasGxeGJoTbmdbPj1?tab=summary&timestamp=2830.0)
